title: stelis famelica
intro: Stelis famelica is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis famelica include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and providing relief from various respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis famelica are made by drying the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
